title: alstonia lenormandii var. coriacea
intro: Alstonia lenormandii var. coriacea, also known as the Coriaceous Alstonia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The Coriaceous Alstonia is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential therapeutic applications. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting pathogens, and improving overall well-being. Alstonia lenormandii var. coriacea is often prepared into herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits.
